name: Key Largo Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Jello powder with water according to package instructions and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add the sugar, oil, eggs, and liqueur to the dry ingredients. Stir until well combined.
4. Grease and flour a 9 x 13 inch pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until set.
6. Remove from oven and cool completely.
7. For the glaze, mix powdered sugar with Key Largo liqueur in a separate bowl.
8. Once cooled, drizzle the glaze evenly over the cake.
9. Refrigerate the cake to allow the glaze to set.
10. Top the chilled cake with whipped topping and garnish with slices of mixed tropical fruit.
